title: Mace Hitboxes
description: Automatically turn on hitboxes when holding a mace, good for PvP
body:
## Mace hiboxes

Simply turns on hitboxes when holding a mace. If  you can hit a player their hitbox will turn red. Useful for PvP. If you want, with mod menu you can configure some settings like the color of the hitbox when you can hit it and more.

In mod menu, you can have the ability to turn on hitboxes in general when you have a mace in your invintory.

You could obviously just use F5+B, but this mod is a bit more convinient as it does this automatically.
